intro.label: Meet Megan
intro.headline: Professional, practical, and focused on how county government should work.
intro.body: Megan Graham is running for Elkhart County Clerk because this office should be organized, reliable, and easier for people to use.

whoSheIs.headline: A candidate focused on competence, service, and follow-through.
whoSheIs.body: This section is structured for real biography details to be added. It should include background, experience, and local ties.

whyRunning.headline: Why She’s Running
whyRunning.body: The Clerk’s Office affects daily life for voters, families, attorneys, employers, and businesses.

whatSheBrings.headline: What She Brings
whatSheBrings.body: This section will highlight relevant experience, management ability, and systems thinking.
